title: Phase 4: Implementation Plan - Critical Fixes for Backend Stability
overview: Execute critical corrections from Phase 3 audit to improve backend security, reliability, and functionality before production deployment

phases.name: Sprint 1: Security & Auth Hardening

tasks.title: Add password complexity validation
tasks.description: Implement password strength requirements in register endpoint
acceptance_criteria: Password must be minimum 8 characters
Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, number, special character
Weak passwords return 400 status with clear error message
Test with weak/strong passwords passes

tasks.title: Add auth-specific rate limiting
tasks.description: Implement stricter rate limits for login/register endpoints (5 attempts per 15 min)
acceptance_criteria: Login limited to 5 attempts per 15 minutes per email address
Register limited to 10 attempts per hour per IP
Returns 429 status when limit exceeded
Rate limiting is bypassed for successful requests

tasks.title: Restrict CORS to allowed origins
tasks.description: Update CORS configuration to whitelist only trusted domains
acceptance_criteria: CORS origin restricted to comma-separated list from .env
Requests from other origins rejected with CORS error
Test with allowed and disallowed origins passes

phases.completion_criteria: All auth endpoints return 401/429 for invalid/rate-limited requests; security test suite passes

phases.name: Sprint 2: Input Validation & Error Handling

tasks.title: Add input validation to all routes
tasks.description: Implement request validation using validator/joi library
acceptance_criteria: All endpoint inputs validated before processing
Empty/null fields rejected with 400 status
Email format validated
Text fields sanitized to prevent XSS
Invalid request test suite passes

tasks.title: Add error handling to POST /translations
tasks.description: Wrap translation creation endpoint in try/catch with proper error responses
acceptance_criteria: Route wrapped in try/catch block
Database errors return 500 with proper format
Validation errors return 400
Error test suite passes

tasks.title: Add confidence field validation
tasks.description: Ensure confidence values are between 0-1, reject invalid data
acceptance_criteria: Schema validates confidence in range [0, 1]
Request validation rejects confidence outside range
Returns 400 for invalid values
Test suite passes

phases.completion_criteria: All endpoints return proper 400/500 status codes; invalid input test suite passes

phases.name: Sprint 3: API Standards & Documentation

tasks.title: Standardize error response format
tasks.description: Define and implement consistent error response schema across all endpoints
acceptance_criteria: All errors return: { code: string, message: string, details?: object, timestamp: ISO8601 }
Error codes defined: AUTH_INVALID, VALIDATION_ERROR, DB_ERROR, etc.
Error handler middleware created
Existing endpoints updated to use new format

tasks.title: Add API versioning to routes
tasks.description: Update all routes to use /api/v1/ prefix for future compatibility
acceptance_criteria: All routes prefixed with /api/v1/
Health endpoint accessible at /api/v1/health
Existing tests updated to use v1 routes
Version can be easily updated when v2 needed

tasks.title: Set up API documentation
tasks.description: Generate Swagger/OpenAPI docs for all endpoints
acceptance_criteria: Swagger UI available at /api/docs
All endpoints documented with request/response examples
Schema definitions for User, Translation, Auth models
Error codes documented

phases.completion_criteria: Error format standardized; routes versioned; docs accessible at /api/docs

phases.name: Sprint 4: Configuration & Logging

tasks.title: Externalize hardcoded configuration
tasks.description: Move all hardcoded values to environment variables
acceptance_criteria: All config moved to .env: PORT, JWT_EXPIRY, LOG_LEVEL, API_RATE_LIMIT
.env.example created with all variables and descriptions
Config loaded from .env at startup
README documents all config variables

tasks.title: Add startup environment validation
tasks.description: Validate required env vars exist at startup; fail fast with clear errors
acceptance_criteria: Server validates JWT_SECRET, MONGODB_URI at startup
Clear error message if required var missing
Process exits with code 1 on validation failure
Startup logs show all resolved config values

tasks.title: Add comprehensive request/response logging
tasks.description: Log all requests with timestamp, method, path, user, status, duration
acceptance_criteria: Every request logged: timestamp, method, path, userId, status, duration
Errors logged with full stack trace
Logs rotated daily and archived
Logs searchable for debugging

phases.completion_criteria: Config fully externalized; startup validates environment; logging captures all requests

phases.name: Sprint 5: Quality Assurance & Testing

tasks.title: Create comprehensive test suite
tasks.description: Expand test coverage beyond happy-path to include error cases and edge conditions
acceptance_criteria: Tests for invalid inputs: empty email, weak password, null fields
Tests for error cases: duplicate email, wrong password, invalid token
Tests for boundary conditions: max/min field lengths
All error codes and status codes verified
Test coverage > 80% for auth and translation endpoints

tasks.title: Verify all critical issues fixed
tasks.description: Integration test: verify the auth → translation complete workflow works
acceptance_criteria: Can register with valid credentials
Can login with correct credentials
JWT token received and properly formatted
Can create translation with valid token
Can retrieve translation with valid token
Cannot access without/with invalid token
Rate limiting blocks repeated auth attempts

phases.completion_criteria: Test suite passes; integration test confirms auth/translation workflow; critical fixes verified

success_criteria: All critical security issues fixed (password validation, rate limiting, CORS, input validation)
All endpoints return consistent error responses with proper status codes
Test suite passes with >80% coverage of critical paths
Integration test verifies auth → translation workflow works end-to-end
Backend ready for Phase 5 (Flutter app integration testing)

risk_mitigation.risk: Rate limiting too strict, blocks legitimate users
risk_mitigation.mitigation: Start with generous limits (10/15min), reduce if abuse detected
Use async logging, batch writes to reduce I/O impact

risk_mitigation.risk: Test suite too slow, slows down development
risk_mitigation.mitigation: Run only modified test files during dev, full suite in CI/CD
Keep /api/v1/ stable, only improve in patch versions

next_steps: Review this plan with the team
Assign team members to each sprint
After each sprint, run test suite and verify corrections are working
Update this plan based on any blockers or scope changes
